g.text: ApiError Struct: Memory Layout & Interface Specification
Runtime Error Generation: Search Validation Failure

ul.li: Headers: Responses MUST include Content-Type: application/json.
Traceability: request_id field in JSON MUST match the X-Request-Id HTTP Header for Sentry/Datadog cross-referencing.
Conditional Fields: The expected and got fields are context-specific.
Serde Attribute: Use #[serde(flatten)] for the details map to elevate context fields to the root of the JSON object.
Skip Nulls: Use #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")] for the request_id field.
The ApiError struct is designed for stack allocation (112 bytes).
Heap allocation only occurs during String or HashMap expansion.
Detail Field 'expected': Value of 768 (from M1 Schema)
Detail Field 'got': Value of 512 (from Client Payload)
Trace Link: request_id injected from actix-web middleware
